title: SCP: Foundation Requisites
description: The largest decorative SCP mod that adds a huge amount of content from the SCP Secret Laboratory and SCP Containment Breach games.
body:
# With this mod you can build a huge SCP Facility and fill it with a large amount of decorations!
## This mod contains many new building blocks and decorations, buttons, BLAST DOORS, some SCP objects, weapons, signs, sounds, structures and even an Admin panel! (Most content is from SCP CB or SCP SL games)
### Wanna know in advance what will be in the next update? Or maybe you want to suggest your idea or share your SCP buildings? Then we are glad to see you in the Discord Server! [https://discord.gg/zHq4A2gj7Z](https://discord.gg/zHq4A2gj7Z)

### ! If your world corrupts with this mod, then also download Just Enough IDs mod and join the world with it !

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_aY0sajHaY4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
